message:
fix(scope): improve cancellation safety and synchronization primitives

Address edge cases in scope cancellation and enhance sync primitives
for better reliability under contention.

Scope and context improvements (cx/cx.rs, cx/scope.rs):
- Prevent zombie tasks via TaskCreationGuard rollback on panic
- Better cancellation token propagation to child scopes
- Improved debug diagnostics for scope lifecycle

Actor module (actor.rs):
- Minor cleanup for consistent cancellation handling

Synchronization primitives:
- mutex.rs: Improve fairness under high contention, better
  integration with cancellation tokens
- semaphore.rs: Fix potential permit leak on cancellation,
  add acquire_many for batch permit acquisition

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
